title: Roger Bacon
subtitle: Scientia experimentalis and the defence of alchemy, 13th c.

narrative.intro: The Oxford Franciscan who folded alchemy into a programme of experimental science and prolongation of life — between Oxford, Paris, and the papal court.
narrative.provenance_note: Events involving Roger Bacon (13 in corpus).
narrative.design_note: Woodcut & Rubric: scholastic black-letter for the Oxford Franciscan; stark contrast for a career of sharp claims and condemnations.
